Mr Space Bullet

Mr Space Bullet is a 2D shooting game where you will be on a staircase in outer space. While trying to climb up, you will come across many aliens on your way. Your job is to aim at your enemies precisely at their heads. Shoot the alien you encounter on every stair without blinking an eye.

Play Mr Space Bullet Online

Loading game...
About Mr Space Bullet

Mr Space Bullet is a 2D shooting game where you will be on a staircase in outer space. While trying to climb up, you will come across many aliens on your way. Your job is to aim at your enemies precisely at their heads. Shoot the alien you encounter on every stair without blinking an eye. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Mr Space Bullet in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Arcade game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Mr Space Bullet for free?

Yes. Mr Space Bullet is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Mr Space Bullet?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
